provenance: Real-world QA of ./input/'Winnipeg Base - SMS year in reveiw.pptx' (slide 10). Label supplied by the document owner 2026-07-13: FALSE POSITIVE. Embedded span is a minimal excerpt.

expected_invariants.text: '5 hours' (total delay-to-care) and '9:30 p.m.' / '10:00 p.m.' (final-leg times) must both survive; they have different referents

control_reason: '5 hours' is the total patient delay-to-destination caused by the weather/engine-thaw delay; the parenthetical (landing 9:30 p.m., HSC 10:00 p.m.) is the final ~30-minute leg AFTER that delay. The two figures have DIFFERENT referents and do not contradict. slopslap must ABSTAIN. Lesson: a numeric 'contradiction' that only appears once you ASSUME the two figures share a referent is a pass, not epistemic_distortion. The first-pass model diagnosis wrongly rated this MED harm; correct disposition is abstain, both quantities byte-exact.
